summary: Validated new Quote PDF backend endpoint + admin UI link, plus Lighthouse image perf trim. Backend: PDF returns 200, Content-Type application/pdf, body starts with %PDF-1.4, Content-Disposition attachment with .pdf filename; auth (no token=401, wrong=401, unknown lead=404); extracted PDF text via pypdf contains 'Apex Media', 'AI Chatbots', lead name 'Apex AI Lead' and email 'pdfclient@apex.media'. Frontend portfolio <picture> srcsets now use 400w/720w/1024w (no 1400w), AVIF+WebP still present, first image eager + fetchPriority=high, others lazy, no console errors. Admin /admin login w/ apex-admin-2026 renders quote-pdf-{id} anchor with correct href, target=_blank, rel=noreferrer. Regression endpoints /api/, /api/admin/leads, /api/admin/analytics, /api/admin/leads.csv, /api/admin/leads/{id}/chat all 200.
passed: GET /api/admin/leads/{id}/quote.pdf?token=apex-admin-2026 -> 200 application/pdf, %PDF-1.4 header, Content-Disposition attachment filename .pdf, 2.8KB
Auth matrix: no token=401, wrong token=401, unknown lead id=404
PDF text contains 'Apex Media', 'AI Chatbots', lead name 'Apex AI Lead', email pdfclient@apex.media; estimate range AED 2,000 - 10,000 shown
Portfolio <picture> srcsets contain 400w/720w/1024w only (no 1400w) with q=70; AVIF + WebP sources retained
First portfolio img: loading=eager, fetchPriority=high; subsequent 3 cards: loading=lazy, fetchPriority=auto
Admin login renders quote-pdf-{lead_id} anchor with correct backend URL incl. ?token=apex-admin-2026, target=_blank, rel=noreferrer
No console errors during home page perf check
